title: OPEN ACCESS CLINIC - 211info
text: MADRAS MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES OPEN ACCESS CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Drop-in center for new clients. Provides a safe, supportive environment where mental health clients can drop in for formal and informal contacts with staff and other clients. The purpose of these contacts is for clients to feel better about themselves while they learn to manage and to recover from their illness. Offer appropriate activities conducive to positive mental health outcomes. 850 SW 4th Street Suite 302 Madras, OR 97741 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday/Tuesday 8:30am-5pm, Wednesday/Thursday 1pm-5pm Email (541) 475-6575 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 475-6575 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for information FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurances. Sliding scale fees and payment plans may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish; ASL interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Jefferson County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Mental Health Drop In Centers Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - YOUNG ADULTS IN TRANSITION MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COMMUNITY MENTAL HEALTH MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - JEFFERSON COUNTY CRISIS LINE MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - WRAPAROUND SERVICES REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - JEFFERSON COUNTY COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MADRAS MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES
